texto: God did not give us the gospel to convince humanity
autor: the gospel was given to us to master the language of a new world called God's Paradise. John 15:16.
explicacao: Citação de the gospel was given to us to master the language of a new world called God's Paradise. John 15:16. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “God did not give us the gospel to convince humanity” articula reflexao, felix-wantang, gospel em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
